title: Infinite Skies
description: Adds the Infinity Stones to Minecraft
body:
Infinite Skies adds the Infinity Stones into Minecraft, each incredibly hard to obtain.

Reality Stone: Allows you to turn blocks into other blocks and turn invisible.

Space Stone: Allows you to teleport, either to a random location or to specific places.
Time Stone: Allows you to pause the day cycle

Mind Stone: Works with the others to allow you to snap

Power Stone: Shoot a powerful bolt that kills anything it hits (Anything vulnerable to projectiles), Gives strength

Soul Stone: Allows you to give yourself Health Boost and Fire Resistance

Snap: Every player (Except the user) has a 50 50 chance to live or die (Creative mode and Spectators are immune). For every player who dies, the user takes 1 point of Void Damage.

 

Most stones need to be found, with 2 in the overworld, 1 in the nether and 1 in the end, however 2 of them need to be crafted instead.
